entries.source: "Explain derivatives step by step"
entries.value: "ଡେରିଭେଟିଭ୍ ଗୁଡ଼ିକୁ ପଦକ୍ଷେପ ଅନୁଯାୟୀ ବୁଝାନ୍ତୁ"

entries.source: "Help with quadratic equations"
entries.value: "ଦ୍ୱିଘାତ ସମୀକରଣରେ ସାହାଯ୍ୟ କରନ୍ତୁ"

entries.source: "Solve 2x + 5 = 17 with me"
entries.value: "ମୋ ସହିତ 2x + 5 = 17 ସମାଧାନ କରନ୍ତୁ"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Math Step Coach on inspir for stem learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: inspir ରେ Math Step Coach କୁ STEM ଶିକ୍ଷା ପାଇଁ ବ୍ୟବହାର କରିବାର ବ୍ୟବହାରିକ ଗାଇଡ୍, ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ, ଅଧ୍ୟୟନ ଲୁପ୍ ଓ ଅଧିକ ସୁରକ୍ଷିତ AI ଅଭ୍ୟାସ ସହିତ।

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: ଅଧିକ ଶକ୍ତିଶାଳୀ ଅଧ୍ୟୟନ ଲୁପ୍

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI ଟ୍ୟୁଟର୍

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ ପାଇଁ a ଛୋଟ ପ୍ରଥମ ପଦକ୍ଷେପ rather than a ଶେଷ ଉତ୍ତର.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: ପଚାରନ୍ତୁ the AI କୁ ଯାଞ୍ଚ ଆପଣଙ୍କ reasoning, ନୁହେଁ just the result.

entries.source: Check each step.
entries.value: ପ୍ରତ୍ୟେକ ପଦକ୍ଷେପ ଯାଞ୍ଚ କରନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Choose a first move.
entries.value: ପ୍ରଥମ ପଦକ୍ଷେପ ବାଛନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Explain why the method works.
entries.value: ପ୍ରଣାଳୀ କାହିଁକି କାମ କରେ ବୁଝାନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Finish ଦ୍ୱାରା ଲେଖନ the ଧାରଣା back ରୁ ସ୍ମୃତି.

entries.source: Learners who want to see why each math step works, not just copy an answer.
entries.value: ଯେଉଁ ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀମାନେ କେବଳ ଉତ୍ତର ନକଲ ନକରି ପ୍ରତ୍ୟେକ ଗଣିତ ପଦକ୍ଷେପ କାହିଁକି କାମ କରେ ତାହା ଦେଖିବାକୁ ଚାହାଁନ୍ତି।

entries.source: Math Step Coach
entries.value: ଗଣିତ ଷ୍ଟେପ୍ କୋଚ୍

entries.source: Math Step Coach For Solving Problems With Understanding is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Solve math by understanding each step. Your coach checks your work, points out slips, and builds confidence.
entries.value: Math Step Coach For Solving Problems With Understanding ହେଉଛି ନିଷ୍କ୍ରିୟ ଉତ୍ତର ସଂଗ୍ରହ ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତେ ଶିକ୍ଷା ପାଇଁ AI ବ୍ୟବହାର କରିବାର କେନ୍ଦ୍ରିତ ଉପାୟ। ଏହି ମୋଡ୍ ଏହି ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦିଷ୍ଟ କାମକୁ କେନ୍ଦ୍ର କରି ତିଆରି: Solve math by understଓing each step. Your coach checks ଆପଣଙ୍କ work, points out slips, ଓ builds confidence।

entries.source: Math Step Coach For Understanding: practical guide
entries.value: ଗଣିତ ପଦକ୍ଷେପ କୋଚ୍ Understanding: ବ୍ୟବହାରିକ ଗାଇଡ୍ ପାଇଁ

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: ଚେଷ୍ଟା କରିବାକୁ ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ

entries.source: Start the live mode at Math Step Coach. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Science Lab Partner. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Math Step Coach ରେ ଲାଇଭ୍ ମୋଡ୍ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରନ୍ତୁ। ପାଖାପାଖି ଶିକ୍ଷା ଫର୍ମାଟ୍ ଚାହିଁଲେ Science Lab Partner ଚେଷ୍ଟା କରନ୍ତୁ। ପ୍ଲାଟଫର୍ମର ବିସ୍ତୃତ ଦୃଶ୍ୟ ପାଇଁ AI ଶିକ୍ଷା ସାଥୀ ସମସ୍ତଙ୍କ ପାଇଁ କ’ଣ କରିବା ଉଚିତ ପଢ଼ନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Tell the ମୋଡ୍ କ’ଣ ଆପଣ ହେଉଛି trying କୁ ଶିଖନ୍ତୁ କିମ୍ବା produce.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: ସେହି ତଫାତ୍ flow ଭିତରେ ଦେଖାଯାଏ। ଏକ giant response ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତେ, ସର୍ବୋତ୍ତମ sessions ଏକ loop ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ଯାଏ: goal set କରନ୍ତୁ, କିଛି ଚେଷ୍ଟା କରନ୍ତୁ, feedback ପାଆନ୍ତୁ, weak spot repair କରନ୍ତୁ, ଏବଂ next action ବାଛନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: ସେହି focus matters. A general chatbot ପାରେ ଉତ୍ତର almost anything, but a ଶିକ୍ଷା ମୋଡ୍ gives the conversation a shape. ଏହା nudges ଆପଣ toward the kind of thinking, ଅଭ୍ୟାସ, ମତାମତ, କିମ୍ବା exploration ସେହି helps the ଧାରଣା stick.

entries.source: The flow checks each step, points out slips, and connects procedures back to the concept.
entries.value: ଏହି ପ୍ରକ୍ରିୟା ପ୍ରତ୍ୟେକ ପଦକ୍ଷେପକୁ ଯାଞ୍ଚ କରେ, ଭୁଲ୍ ଦର୍ଶାଏ ଏବଂ ପ୍ରଣାଳୀଗୁଡ଼ିକୁ ଧାରଣା ସହିତ ସଂଯୋଗ କରେ।

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: ଏହି ହେଉଛି the same ଅଭ୍ୟାସ behind studying ସହିତ AI ନକଲ୍ ଛଡ଼ା yourself: keep the ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ active. AI ହେଉଛି most ଉପଯୋଗୀ କେବେ ଏହା gives ଆପଣ ମତାମତ ଉପରେ ଆପଣଙ୍କ thinking.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: ଏହି ମୋଡ୍ ହେଉଛି especially ଉପଯୋଗୀ ପାଇଁ ଶିକ୍ଷାର୍ଥୀ କିଏ want କୁ:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: ପଦକ୍ଷେପଟିକୁ ନିଜ ଶବ୍ଦରେ ଚେଷ୍ଟା କରନ୍ତୁ।

entries.source: Use Math Step Coach when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: ତୁରନ୍ତ ଆରମ୍ଭ ହେବା ସହିତ ଆପଣଙ୍କୁ ଅନୁକୂଳ ହୋଇପାରୁଥିବା session ଚାହିଁଲେ Math Step Coach ବ୍ୟବହାର କରନ୍ତୁ। ପ୍ରଥମ ଲକ୍ଷ୍ୟ impressive ଶୁଣାଯିବା ନୁହେଁ; ପ୍ରଥମ ଲକ୍ଷ୍ୟ ପରବର୍ତ୍ତୀ ପଦକ୍ଷେପକୁ ସମ୍ଭବ ଲାଗିବା ଭାବେ କରିବା।

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: ଏହି ମୋଡ୍ କେଉଁଥିରେ ସାହାଯ୍ୟ କରେ

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: ପରେ କେଉଁଠାକୁ ଯିବେ

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: ଆପଣ ପାରେ also ଆରମ୍ଭ ସହିତ a rough version of ଆପଣଙ୍କ ବାସ୍ତବ ସମସ୍ୟା. A messy ପ୍ରଥମ ପ୍ରମ୍ପ୍ଟ ହେଉଛି fine. The ଅଧିବେଶନ ପାରେ clarify the level, ଦର୍ଶକ, deadline, ଓ style once ଆପଣ begin.
